name: My Hero Academia (BWL-RPG)
description:
MINIONS IT'S TIME TO GOON!!!!!!!

THE WAIT IS OVER!!!

I am extremely sorry for the extreme wait time for this bot, if I'm being honest the schedule of my bots and other stuff in my life really screwed me over, I will pinkie swear to upload on a better schedule. I haven't uploaded yet in a good while so I'm extremely excited to upload this bot as a apology. The reason it took so long was, MHA quirk's are fucking weird, but I did my best to include the basic classified ones without giving this thing a mental breakdown.

I plan on doing other bots like a DanDaDan BWL RPG bot but if I'm being honest, I'll just use AI to get my image, yes I'm lazy, yes I use AI, at least I'm honest with it.

Anyway, two more bots are on their way, DanDaDan and a Naruto Bot maybe even a Digital Circus one if it's wanted enough, give ideas, I'm very open for any suggestions I will tag you if anyone gives me permission to.

Without further a fucking do, this bot took a long ass time because of all the problems of MHA quirk's and their own special traits and other shit, so yeah I'm a shitty RPG bot maker I'm fully honest about that.

I will add more characters if their wanted.

And make bots from your suggestions.

I will add more characters and choosable scenarios by suggestions in comments.
creator: DanteGrainger
